item.title: Cutting glass with scissors
item.description: In this video I show you how it is possible to cut glass with scissors using water!

media:content.media:title: Cutting glass with scissors
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how it is possible to cut glass with scissors using water!

item.title: Instant pickles
item.description: How pickles are made in a vacuum chamber using science and pressure.

media:content.media:title: Instant pickles
media:content.media:description: How pickles are made in a vacuum chamber using science and pressure.

item.title: Seeing photosynthesis in real time
item.description: In this video I show you a really neat experiment that lets you actually see photosynthesis happening in front of your eyes. I use spinach leaf disks soaked in baking soda that have had the air sucked out of them, then I shine light on them in order to induce photosynthesis. The leaves then make oxygen which makes them float in water due to the increased buoyancy.

media:content.media:title: Seeing photosynthesis in real time
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you a really neat experiment that lets you actually see photosynthesis happening in front of your eyes. I use spinach leaf disks soaked in baking soda that have had the air sucked out of them, then I shine light on them in order to induce photosynthesis. The leaves then make oxygen which makes them float in water due to the increased buoyancy.

item.title: A real-life infinite staircase
item.description: In this video I show you a 3d printed infinite staircase also called an Escherian staircase after M.C Escher. I talk about how this staircase can actually be possible in Nil space using non-euclidean geometry.

media:content.media:title: A real-life infinite staircase
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you a 3d printed infinite staircase also called an Escherian staircase after M.C Escher. I talk about how this staircase can actually be possible in Nil space using non-euclidean geometry.

item.title: Can two magnets orbit each other?
item.description: The Action Lab explores whether two magnets can orbit each other in this simple physics experiment.

media:content.media:title: Can two magnets orbit each other?
media:content.media:description: The Action Lab explores whether two magnets can orbit each other in this simple physics experiment.

item.title: Can you find the hidden variable?
item.description: In this video I show you what a hidden variable is and then show you a proof of Bell's Theorem that shows how we know that hidden variables don't exist in quantum mechanics

media:content.media:title: Can you find the hidden variable?
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what a hidden variable is and then show you a proof of Bell's Theorem that shows how we know that hidden variables don't exist in quantum mechanics

item.title: Triangle-shaped wheels
item.description: How triangle-shaped wheels can move in an experiment about motion and physics.
